scripts.setup:help: echo See SETUP-WITHOUT-DOCKER.md for Windows setup without Docker
scripts.build:backend: npm run build --prefix backend/auth-service && npm run build --prefix backend/product-service && npm run build --prefix backend/order-service
scripts.test:unit: npm run test --prefix backend/auth-service && npm run test --prefix backend/product-service && npm run test --prefix backend/order-service && npm run test --prefix frontend
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
